summary: HTTP client for Ollama API with chat completion, health checks, and model listing
side_effects: Makes HTTP requests to external Ollama API endpoint
Creates HTTP client with configurable timeout
notes: Implements OpenAI-compatible chat endpoint for Ollama. Uses openRouterRequest/Response types from openrouter.go. Methods: ChatCompletion, HealthCheck, ListModels, HasModel. Helper: isConnectionError for user-friendly error messages.
